---
title: "Supplementary: Number of Clustering Runs"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(here)
library(tidyr)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "data.R"))
```

# Number of clustering runs

```{r supp-num-runs, fig.height=5, fig.width=6.69}
num_runs_full <- metrics_new %>%
  filter(filtering == "manual") %>%
  select(dataset, method, d_cluster, num_runs_leiden, num_runs_louvain) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(num_runs_leiden, num_runs_louvain),
    names_to = "algorithm", values_to = "num_runs"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    algorithm = recode(algorithm,
      num_runs_leiden = "Leiden", num_runs_louvain = "Louvain"
    ),
    d_cluster = factor(d_cluster)
  )

num_runs <- num_runs_full %>% filter(d_cluster == 0)

ggplot(num_runs, aes(x = method, y = num_runs, colour = algorithm)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(0.7)) +
  facet_wrap(~dataset) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Algorithm", values = c(Leiden = "#0077BB", Louvain = "#EE7733")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Method", y = "Number of runs") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_markdown(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1.1))
```

# ANOVA: effect of method

```{r num-runs-anova}
fit <- aov(
  num_runs ~ algorithm + dataset + d_cluster + method,
  data = num_runs_full
)
summary(fit)
```

# Sample sizes

```{r num-runs-n}
num_runs %>%
  group_by(dataset, method, algorithm) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(!is.na(num_runs)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = algorithm, values_from = n) %>%
  arrange(dataset, method) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```
